title: TopicVocabEntry collection
description: Schema for src/data/vocabulary/1000-topic-words.json. Top-level array of 900–1050 TopicVocabEntry objects extracted from `1000 từ vựng tiếng Anh theo chủ đề.pdf`.

id.description: Sequential 1-based identifier reflecting PDF order; no gaps.

stt.description: Per-book sequence number printed in the PDF's STT column. May skip values. null only if the source row lacked a number.

partOfSpeech.description: Lowercased part-of-speech tag (e.g. 'n', 'v', 'adj'); null if absent.

phonetic.description: IPA phonetic transcription; null if absent.

category.description: Topic heading from the PDF, stored exactly as it appears. Defaults to 'Uncategorized' when no heading has been seen yet.

session.description: Study session 1-32 assigned by sequential block distribution in PDF order.
